untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit zigzag peak/trough detection logic with configurable threshold calibration. The allowed indicator set lacks a native zigzag filter or peak/trough detector. Pattern confirmation (head-and-shoulders, reversal patterns) at specific scales cannot be expressed with available indicators. The detection_lag_tolerance and pattern_scale context parameters have no direct mapping to quantifiable indicator conditions.
translation_notes: Approximated 10% threshold movements using returns indicator. Entry conditions use directional price movement (close vs prev_high/low) combined with 10% return threshold as proxy for zigzag peak/trough detection. Exit conditions use reversal beyond threshold. This is a lossy translation; true zigzag filtering and pattern recognition require custom indicator implementation or machine learning pattern detection unavailable in the allowed set.
